name: getThisMessage
title: getThisMessage
description: Copies the data of a AMS message into the msg variable.
This function must be used exclusively within a an event procedure on mostAMSMessage.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of use data bytes that have to be copied.

description: The following program section copies 1000 bytes of a message's useful data to the local variable msg on Channel 1. Afterwards the contents of byte 500 are output to the Write Window.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
